description.en: Fully qualified domain name resolving to this address (host + domain, e.g. inverter.lan). No trailing dot. Optional — an address need not have a name.

An L3 address assigned to the interface — an IPv4 dotted-quad (192.0.2.10) or IPv6 (2001:db8::1). The `ip_family` sibling records which. No sensible default — deployment-specific, supplied downstream.
